description:
They do not serve Queens or any of the following zip codes in Brooklyn/the Bronx: 11206 11208 11210 11214 11215 11221 11226 10463 10452 10453 10459 10460 10461 10465

Volunteer network delivering groceries. You can prepay for the order, reimburse them, or ask them to visit a free food pantry on your behalf. For a food pantry pickup, include the pantry name & contact info in the "Order" section. In the "Notes" section, include pantry hours & any other relevant pickup or delivery instructions. Reimbursement type would be "Order ahead".
name: Invisible Hands

- Needs volunteers
name: Salvation Army, Elizabeth Corps

Registration can be completed online in advance or on‑site.

description_es: En el caso de alguien que no pueda seguir los pasos, envíe un correo electrónico a Tara a **lancyancypants@aol.com** cuando vendrá para que pueda estar atenta para ayudarlo mejor.
description:
In the case of someone who absolutely can't make it up the steps, please email Tara at **lancyancypants@aol.com** when you will be coming so she can keep an eye out to better help you. 
267-336-3250
stpaulspantry19120 @gmail.com

No handicap access

On-site registration required
name: St. Paul's Evangelical Lutheran Church

description:
**How to Receive Food Assistance**

To receive food from Manna Food Market, please call our main office at (301) 424-1130 during business hours, Monday through Friday, 9:00 AM - 4:00 PM.

During your call, a referral representative will ask a few simple questions to determine eligibility:
*   Are you a Montgomery County resident?
*   Does your income fall below the self-sufficiency threshold?

**Important:** Please call by 12:00 PM (noon) the day before you wish to receive food, so we can prepare your order.

**Food Pickup:**
When picking up your food, please bring:
*   A photo ID with your current Montgomery County address, OR
*   A document that proves your current residency in Montgomery County.

If you are unable to pick up your food on the scheduled day, you must call Manna to reschedule.
name: Manna Food Market (OCP)
